creator: vivek@khera.org
text:
On Jun 19, 2007, at 3:50 PM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of mail/postfix,
>
> Please note that PR ports/113864 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.

Is this a security fix or a feature enhancement?  It looks like  
you're back-porting an enhancement from the development version of  
postfix into the stable release version.  That does not seem like a  
legitimate purpose for a patch in the ports to me.  If it is a  
security fix, please elaborate on that.
